_comment: OpenCode — merge into ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json. The `instructions` entry is what actually makes OpenCode load Neuron's guidance every session (it does NOT surface the MCP server's own instructions). The server key must be `neuron5` so the handshake plugin's tool names (neuron5_help, ...) resolve. Run `neuron init --client opencode` to copy the opener and add this automatically.
